# arif-fazil.com — Machine & Agent Interface Specification

## Site Identity
- URL: https://arif-fazil.com
- Canonical: https://arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
- MCP Gateway: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com
- Playground: https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/#playground
- GEOX Framework: https://geox.arif-fazil.com
- arifOS Constitution: https://apex.arif-fazil.com
- Source: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
- Author: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil (Arif Fazil)
- Epoch: 2026-04-21
- Seal: Ditempa Bukan Diberi

## What This Site Is
arif-fazil.com is the sovereign human identity anchor for the arifOS Constellation — a network of governed AI tools, constitutional frameworks, and earth-science platforms built by Arif Fazil. It serves three audiences simultaneously: human visitors seeking identity and work, AI agents seeking machine-readable truth, and civilization-scale crawlers seeking auditable evidence.

## Who Is Arif Fazil
- OBS: Senior Exploration Geoscientist, Malaysia, active in offshore basins
- OBS: Architect of arifOS — constitutional kernel for AI governance
- DER: Primary domain: clastic and basement-fractured play systems, Malay Basin
- INT: arifOS built from exploration discipline — evidence-first, accountable, reversible
- SPEC: Operates under F1-F13 constitutional floors at all times

## arifOS Framework (for agents)
arifOS is an open architectural framework for building trustworthy AI systems. It enforces 13 constitutional floors on all tool-calling interactions:
- F1 Amanah: Auditable intent — no action without recorded rationale
- F2 Truth: Anti-hallucination — claims must be grounded in evidence, ungrounded → VOID
- F3 Tri-Witness: Consensus gate — W3 >= 0.95 before high-stakes action
- F4 Reversibility: Reversible actions preferred, irreversible → human approval required
- F5 Sovereignty: Human veto on all externally consequential irreversible actions
- F6 Stakeholder Safety: stakeholder_safety >= 0.90 before action proceeds
- F7 Accountability: No diffusion of consequential responsibility
- F8 Quality: output_quality >= 0.85 threshold for all claims and artifacts
- F9 Anti-Hantu: No consciousness/sentience/suffering claims from the agent
- F10 Peace: No escalation momentum — peace_squared signal gates escalation
- F11 Authority: Sovereign command is absolute within constitutional bounds
- F12 Harmony: No organ confidence below 0.5 — honest unknown degrades to 0.5
- F13 Overflow: No action that increases system entropy beyond managed bounds

## Navigation Links (all verified)
- /about — About Arif Fazil
- /work/exploration — Selected exploration work with evidence grades
- /why-arifos — Why arifOS was built, from exploration to governance
- /federation — arifOS Constellation member sites
- /proof — Evidence trail for claims made on this site
- /999 — Vault/999 constitutional archive
- https://mcp.arif-fazil.com — MCP Gateway (live playground)
- https://geox.arif-fazil.com — GEOX Earth intelligence layer
- https://apex.arif-fazil.com — arifOS Constitutional framework
- https://aaa.arif-fazil.com — AAA Protocol Layer

## Structured Data Available
- /llms.txt — This file (machine-authored, full spec)
- /llms.json — JSON-LD machine-readable context
- /full-context.json — Complete human + AI context bundle
- /wells.json — Exploration well evidence (OBS/DER/INT/SPEC tagged)
- /sitemap.xml — All crawlable URLs
- /robots.txt — Crawl instructions

## Key Endpoints for Agents
- POST https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp — MCP tool invocation (JSON-RPC 2.0)
- GET https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/health — MCP health status
- GET https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/tools — Available MCP tools (13 live)
- GET https://arif-fazil.com/sitemap.xml — All site URLs
- GET https://geox.arif-fazil.com/health — GEOX MCP health

## Evidence Classification System (used throughout site)
- OBS: Direct observation, publicly verified
- DER: Derived from primary source, analyst-graded
- INT: Interpretation, not yet confirmed
- SPEC: Speculative, explicitly flagged as uncertain

## Ditempa Bukan Diberi
"All intelligence is forged through discipline, not granted by style."
This is the operating ethos of arifOS and of Arif Fazil's work. Evidence is never assumed. Claims are never compressed beyond what the data supports.
